name: Spicy Tomato Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh coriander or chopped green onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the tomatoes in a food processor and set aside.
2. In a soup pot, puree the cooked white fish with coconut milk.
3. Add the blended tomato mixture, coconut milk, curry paste, fish sauce, and lemon juice to the soup pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Sprinkle chopped fresh coriander or green onion tops over the soup before serving.
